    APPLICATIONS_BUILD_UPDATE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope

    APPPLICATIONS_COMMANDS - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows your app to add commands to a guild - included by default with the bot scope
    APPPLICATIONS_COMMANDS_PERMISSIONS_UPDATE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows your app to update permissions for its commands in a guild a user has permissions to
    APPPLICATIONS_COMMANDS_UPDATE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows your app to update its commands using a Bearer token - client credentials grant only
    APPPLICATIONS_ENTITLEMENTS - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows your app to read entitlements for a user’s applications
    APPPLICATIONS_STORE_UPDATE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows your app to read and update store data (SKUs, store listings, achievements, etc.) for a user’s applications

    GUILDS - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows /users/@me/guilds to return basic information about all of a user’s guilds
    GUILDS_JOIN - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows /guilds/{guild.id}/members/{user.id} to be used for joining users to a guild In order to add a user to a guild, your bot has to already belong to that guild.
    GUILDS_MEMBERS_READ - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    allows /users/@me/guilds/{guild.id}/member to return a user’s member information in a guild

    RPC - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    for local rpc server access, this allows you to control a user’s local Discord client - only available to approved partners
    RPC_ACTIVITIES_WRITE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user’s activity - only available to approved partners
    RPC_NOTIFICATIONS_READ - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    for local rpc server access, this allows you to receive notifications pushed out to the user - only available to approved partners
    RPC_VOICE_READ - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    for local rpc server access, this allows you to read a user’s voice settings and listen for voice events - only available to approved partners
    RPC_VOICE_WRITE - Enum constant in enum class dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.access.OAuthScope
    for local rpc server access, this allows you to update a user’s voice settings - only available to approved partners
